verses.latin_vulgate: Prope est ut veniat tempus ejus,  et dies ejus non elongabuntur.  Miserebitur enim Dominus Jacob,  et eliget adhuc de Israël,  et requiescere eos faciet super humum suam ;  adjungetur advena ad eos,  et adhærebit domui Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי֩ יְרַחֵ֨ם יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶֽת־יַעֲקֹ֗ב וּבָחַ֥ר עוֹד֙ בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְהִנִּיחָ֖ם עַל־אַדְמָתָ֑ם וְנִלְוָ֤ה הַגֵּר֙ עֲלֵיהֶ֔ם וְנִסְפְּח֖וּ עַל־בֵּ֥ית יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.king_james: For the Lord will have mercy on Jacob, and will yet choose Israel, and set them in their own land: and the strangers shall be joined with them, and they shall cleave to the house of Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tenebunt eos populi,  et adducent eos in locum suum ;  et possidebit eos domus Israël  super terram Domini  in servos et ancillas :  et erunt capientes eos qui se ceperant,  et subjicient exactores suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְקָח֣וּם עַמִּים֮ וֶהֱבִיא֣וּם אֶל־מְקוֹמָם֒ וְהִֽתְנַחֲל֣וּם בֵּֽית־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל עַ֚ל אַדְמַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה לַעֲבָדִ֖ים וְלִשְׁפָח֑וֹת וְהָיוּ֙ שֹׁבִ֣ים לְשֹׁבֵיהֶ֔ם וְרָד֖וּ בְּנֹגְשֵׂיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And the people shall take them, and bring them to their place: and the house of Israel shall possess them in the land of the Lord for servants and handmaids: and they shall take them captives, whose captives they were; and they shall rule over their oppressors.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa : cum requiem dederit tibi Deus  a labore tuo, et a concussione tua,  et a servitute dura qua ante servisti,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה בְּי֨וֹם הָנִ֤יחַ יְהֹוָה֙ לְךָ֔ מֵֽעׇצְבְּךָ֖ וּמִֽרׇגְזֶ֑ךָ וּמִן־הָעֲבֹדָ֥ה הַקָּשָׁ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר עֻבַּד־בָּֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in the day that the Lord shall give thee rest from thy sorrow, and from thy fear, and from the hard bondage wherein thou wast made to serve,

verses.latin_vulgate: sumes parabolam istam  contra regem Babylonis, et dices :  Quomodo cessavit exactor ;  quievit tributum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָשָׂ֜אתָ הַמָּשָׁ֥ל הַזֶּ֛ה עַל־מֶ֥לֶךְ בָּבֶ֖ל וְאָמָ֑רְתָּ אֵ֚יךְ שָׁבַ֣ת נֹגֵ֔שׂ שָׁבְתָ֖ה מַדְהֵבָֽה׃
verses.king_james: That thou shalt take up this proverb against the king of Babylon, and say, How hath the oppressor ceased! the golden city ceased!

verses.latin_vulgate: Contrivit Dominus baculum impiorum,  virgam dominantium,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁבַ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה מַטֵּ֣ה רְשָׁעִ֑ים שֵׁ֖בֶט מֹשְׁלִֽים׃
verses.king_james: The Lord hath broken the staff of the wicked, and the sceptre of the rulers.

verses.latin_vulgate: cædentem populos in indignatione  plaga insanabili,  subjicientem in furore gentes,  persequentem crudeliter.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַכֶּ֤ה עַמִּים֙ בְּעֶבְרָ֔ה מַכַּ֖ת בִּלְתִּ֣י סָרָ֑ה רֹדֶ֤ה בָאַף֙ גּוֹיִ֔ם מֻרְדָּ֖ף בְּלִ֥י חָשָֽׂךְ׃
verses.king_james: He who smote the people in wrath with a continual stroke, he that ruled the nations in anger, is persecuted, and none hindereth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conquievit et siluit omnis terra,  gavisa est et exsultavit ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָ֥חָה שָׁקְטָ֖ה כׇּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ פָּצְח֖וּ רִנָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: The whole earth is at rest, and is quiet: they break forth into singing.

verses.latin_vulgate: abietes quoque lætatæ sunt super te,  et cedri Libani :  ex quo dormisti, non ascendet  qui succidat nos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־בְּרוֹשִׁ֛ים שָׂמְח֥וּ לְךָ֖ אַרְזֵ֣י לְבָנ֑וֹן מֵאָ֣ז שָׁכַ֔בְתָּ לֹא־יַעֲלֶ֥ה הַכֹּרֵ֖ת עָלֵֽינוּ׃
verses.king_james: Yea, the fir trees rejoice at thee, and the cedars of Lebanon, saying, Since thou art laid down, no feller is come up against us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Infernus subter conturbatus est  in occursum adventus tui ;  suscitavit tibi gigantes.  Omnes principes terræ  surrexerunt de soliis suis,  omnes principes nationum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁא֗וֹל מִתַּ֛חַת רָגְזָ֥ה לְךָ֖ לִקְרַ֣את בּוֹאֶ֑ךָ עוֹרֵ֨ר לְךָ֤ רְפָאִים֙ כׇּל־עַתּ֣וּדֵי אָ֔רֶץ הֵקִים֙ מִכִּסְאוֹתָ֔ם כֹּ֖ל מַלְכֵ֥י גוֹיִֽם׃
verses.king_james: Hell from beneath is moved for thee to meet thee at thy coming: it stirreth up the dead for thee, even all the chief ones of the earth; it hath raised up from their thrones all the kings of the nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Universi respondebunt, et dicent tibi :  Et tu vulneratus es sicut et nos ;  nostri similis effectus es.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֻּלָּ֣ם יַעֲנ֔וּ וְיֹאמְר֖וּ אֵלֶ֑יךָ גַּם־אַתָּ֛ה חֻלֵּ֥יתָ כָמ֖וֹנוּ אֵלֵ֥ינוּ נִמְשָֽׁלְתָּ׃
verses.king_james: All they shall speak and say unto thee, Art thou also become weak as we? art thou become like unto us?

verses.latin_vulgate: Detracta est ad inferos superbia tua,  concidit cadaver tuum ;  subter te sternetur tinea,  et operimentum tuum erunt vermes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוּרַ֥ד שְׁא֛וֹל גְּאוֹנֶ֖ךָ הֶמְיַ֣ת נְבָלֶ֑יךָ תַּחְתֶּ֙יךָ֙ יֻצַּ֣ע רִמָּ֔ה וּמְכַסֶּ֖יךָ תּוֹלֵעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thy pomp is brought down to the grave, and the noise of thy viols: the worm is spread under thee, and the worms cover thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quomodo cecidisti de cælo,  Lucifer, qui mane oriebaris ?  corruisti in terram,  qui vulnerabas gentes ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֛יךְ נָפַ֥לְתָּ מִשָּׁמַ֖יִם הֵילֵ֣ל בֶּן־שָׁ֑חַר נִגְדַּ֣עְתָּ לָאָ֔רֶץ חוֹלֵ֖שׁ עַל־גּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.king_james: How art thou fallen from heaven, O Lucifer, son of the morning! how art thou cut down to the ground, which didst weaken the nations!

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dicebas in corde tuo :  In cælum conscendam,  super astra Dei  exaltabo solium meum ;  sedebo in monte testamenti,  in lateribus aquilonis ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֞ה אָמַ֤רְתָּ בִֽלְבָבְךָ֙ הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם אֶעֱלֶ֔ה מִמַּ֥עַל לְכוֹכְבֵי־אֵ֖ל אָרִ֣ים כִּסְאִ֑י וְאֵשֵׁ֥ב בְּהַר־מוֹעֵ֖ד בְּיַרְכְּתֵ֥י צָפֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: For thou hast said in thine heart, I will ascend into heaven, I will exalt my throne above the stars of God: I will sit also upon the mount of the congregation, in the sides of the north:

verses.latin_vulgate: ascendam super altitudinem nubium,  similis ero Altissimo ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֶעֱלֶ֖ה עַל־בָּ֣מֳתֵי עָ֑ב אֶדַּמֶּ֖ה לְעֶלְיֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: I will ascend above the heights of the clouds; I will be like the most High.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen ad infernum detraheris,  in profundum laci.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֧ךְ אֶל־שְׁא֛וֹל תּוּרָ֖ד אֶל־יַרְכְּתֵי־בֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Yet thou shalt be brought down to hell, to the sides of the pit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui te viderint, ad te inclinabuntur,  teque prospicient :  Numquid iste est vir qui conturbavit terram,  qui concussit regna,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֹאֶ֙יךָ֙ אֵלֶ֣יךָ יַשְׁגִּ֔יחוּ אֵלֶ֖יךָ יִתְבּוֹנָ֑נוּ הֲזֶ֤ה הָאִישׁ֙ מַרְגִּ֣יז הָאָ֔רֶץ מַרְעִ֖ישׁ מַמְלָכֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: They that see thee shall narrowly look upon thee, and consider thee, saying, Is this the man that made the earth to tremble, that did shake kingdoms;

verses.latin_vulgate: qui posuit orbem desertum,  et urbes ejus destruxit,  vinctis ejus non aperuit carcerem ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׂ֥ם תֵּבֵ֛ל כַּמִּדְבָּ֖ר וְעָרָ֣יו הָרָ֑ס אֲסִירָ֖יו לֹא־פָ֥תַח בָּֽיְתָה׃
verses.king_james: That made the world as a wilderness, and destroyed the cities thereof; that opened not the house of his prisoners?

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes reges gentium  universi dormierunt in gloria,  vir in domo sua ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־מַלְכֵ֥י גוֹיִ֖ם כֻּלָּ֑ם שָׁכְב֥וּ בְכָב֖וֹד אִ֥ישׁ בְּבֵיתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: All the kings of the nations, even all of them, lie in glory, every one in his own house.

verses.latin_vulgate: tu autem projectus es de sepulchro tuo,  quasi stirps inutilis pollutus,  et obvolutus cum his qui interfecti sunt gladio,  et descenderunt ad fundamenta laci,  quasi cadaver putridum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֞ה הׇשְׁלַ֤כְתָּ מִֽקִּבְרְךָ֙ כְּנֵ֣צֶר נִתְעָ֔ב לְבֻ֥שׁ הֲרֻגִ֖ים מְטֹ֣עֲנֵי חָ֑רֶב יוֹרְדֵ֥י אֶל־אַבְנֵי־ב֖וֹר כְּפֶ֥גֶר מוּבָֽס׃
verses.king_james: But thou art cast out of thy grave like an abominable branch, and as the raiment of those that are slain, thrust through with a sword, that go down to the stones of the pit; as a carcase trodden under feet.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non habebis consortium, neque cum eis in sepultura ;  tu enim terram tuam disperdidisti,  tu populum tuum occidisti :  non vocabitur in æternum  semen pessimorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־תֵחַ֤ד אִתָּם֙ בִּקְבוּרָ֔ה כִּי־אַרְצְךָ֥ שִׁחַ֖תָּ עַמְּךָ֣ הָרָ֑גְתָּ לֹא־יִקָּרֵ֥א לְעוֹלָ֖ם זֶ֥רַע מְרֵעִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Thou shalt not be joined with them in burial, because thou hast destroyed thy land, and slain thy people: the seed of evildoers shall never be renowned.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præparate filios ejus occisioni,  in iniquitate patrum suorum :  non consurgent, nec hæreditabunt terram,  neque implebunt faciem orbis civitatum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָכִ֧ינוּ לְבָנָ֛יו מַטְבֵּ֖חַ בַּעֲוֺ֣ן אֲבוֹתָ֑ם בַּל־יָקֻ֙מוּ֙ וְיָ֣רְשׁוּ אָ֔רֶץ וּמָלְא֥וּ פְנֵי־תֵבֵ֖ל עָרִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Prepare slaughter for his children for the iniquity of their fathers; that they do not rise, nor possess the land, nor fill the face of the world with cities.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et consurgam super eos,  dicit Dominus exercituum ;  et perdam Babylonis nomen, et reliquias,  et germen, et progeniem, dicit Dominus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקַמְתִּ֣י עֲלֵיהֶ֔ם נְאֻ֖ם יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֑וֹת וְהִכְרַתִּ֨י לְבָבֶ֜ל שֵׁ֥ם וּשְׁאָ֛ר וְנִ֥ין וָנֶ֖כֶד נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For I will rise up against them, saith the Lord of hosts, and cut off from Babylon the name, and remnant, and son, and nephew, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: et ponam eam in possessionem ericii,  et in paludes aquarum,  et scopabo eam in scopa terens,  dicit Dominus exercituum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׂמְתִּ֛יהָ לְמוֹרַ֥שׁ קִפֹּ֖ד וְאַגְמֵי־מָ֑יִם וְטֵאטֵאתִ֙יהָ֙ בְּמַטְאֲטֵ֣א הַשְׁמֵ֔ד נְאֻ֖ם יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָאֽוֹת׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: I will also make it a possession for the bittern, and pools of water: and I will sweep it with the besom of destruction, saith the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juravit Dominus exercituum, dicens :  Si non, ut putavi, ita erit ;  et quomodo mente tractavi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נִשְׁבַּ֛ע יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת לֵאמֹ֑ר אִם־לֹ֞א כַּאֲשֶׁ֤ר דִּמִּ֙יתִי֙ כֵּ֣ן הָיָ֔תָה וְכַאֲשֶׁ֥ר יָעַ֖צְתִּי הִ֥יא תָקֽוּם׃
verses.king_james: The Lord of hosts hath sworn, saying, Surely as I have thought, so shall it come to pass; and as I have purposed, so shall it stand:

verses.latin_vulgate: sic eveniet :  ut conteram Assyrium in terra mea,  et in montibus meis conculcem eum ;  et auferetur ab eis jugum ejus,  et onus illius ab humero eorum tolletur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִשְׁבֹּ֤ר אַשּׁוּר֙ בְּאַרְצִ֔י וְעַל־הָרַ֖י אֲבוּסֶ֑נּוּ וְסָ֤ר מֵֽעֲלֵיהֶם֙ עֻלּ֔וֹ וְסֻ֨בֳּל֔וֹ מֵעַ֥ל שִׁכְמ֖וֹ יָסֽוּר׃
verses.king_james: That I will break the Assyrian in my land, and upon my mountains tread him under foot: then shall his yoke depart from off them, and his burden depart from off their shoulders.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc consilium quod cogitavi super omnem terram ;  et hæc est manus extenta super universas gentes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֹ֛את הָעֵצָ֥ה הַיְּעוּצָ֖ה עַל־כׇּל־הָאָ֑רֶץ וְזֹ֛את הַיָּ֥ד הַנְּטוּיָ֖ה עַל־כׇּל־הַגּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.king_james: This is the purpose that is purposed upon the whole earth: and this is the hand that is stretched out upon all the nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus enim exercituum decrevit ; et quis poterit infirmare ?  et manus ejus extenta ; et quis avertet eam ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־יְהֹוָ֧ה צְבָא֛וֹת יָעָ֖ץ וּמִ֣י יָפֵ֑ר וְיָד֥וֹ הַנְּטוּיָ֖ה וּמִ֥י יְשִׁיבֶֽנָּה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: For the Lord of hosts hath purposed, and who shall disannul it? and his hand is stretched out, and who shall turn it back?

verses.latin_vulgate: In anno quo mortuus est rex Achaz, factum est onus istud :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַת־מ֖וֹת הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ אָחָ֑ז הָיָ֖ה הַמַּשָּׂ֥א הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.king_james: In the year that king Ahaz died was this burden.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne lætaris, Philisthæa omnis tu,  quoniam comminuta est virga percussoris tui ;  de radice enim colubri egredietur regulus,  et semen ejus absorbens volucrem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַֽל־תִּשְׂמְחִ֤י פְלֶ֙שֶׁת֙ כֻּלֵּ֔ךְ כִּ֥י נִשְׁבַּ֖ר שֵׁ֣בֶט מַכֵּ֑ךְ כִּֽי־מִשֹּׁ֤רֶשׁ נָחָשׁ֙ יֵ֣צֵא צֶ֔פַע וּפִרְי֖וֹ שָׂרָ֥ף מְעוֹפֵֽף׃
verses.king_james: Rejoice not thou, whole Palestina, because the rod of him that smote thee is broken: for out of the serpent’s root shall come forth a cockatrice, and his fruit shall be a fiery flying serpent.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et pascentur primogeniti pauperum,  et pauperes fiducialiter requiescent ;  et interire faciam in fame radicem tuam,  et reliquias tuas interficiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָעוּ֙ בְּכוֹרֵ֣י דַלִּ֔ים וְאֶבְיוֹנִ֖ים לָבֶ֣טַח יִרְבָּ֑צוּ וְהֵמַתִּ֤י בָרָעָב֙ שׇׁרְשֵׁ֔ךְ וּשְׁאֵרִיתֵ֖ךְ יַהֲרֹֽג׃
verses.king_james: And the firstborn of the poor shall feed, and the needy shall lie down in safety: and I will kill thy root with famine, and he shall slay thy remnant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ulula, porta ; clama civitas ;  prostrata est Philisthæa omnis ;  ab aquilone enim fumus veniet,  et non est qui effugiet agmen ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵילִ֤ילִֽי שַׁ֙עַר֙ זַֽעֲקִי־עִ֔יר נָמ֖וֹג פְּלֶ֣שֶׁת כֻּלֵּ֑ךְ כִּ֤י מִצָּפוֹן֙ עָשָׁ֣ן בָּ֔א וְאֵ֥ין בּוֹדֵ֖ד בְּמוֹעָדָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Howl, O gate; cry, O city; thou, whole Palestina, art dissolved: for there shall come from the north a smoke, and none shall be alone in his appointed times.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et quid respondebitur nuntiis gentis ?  Quia Dominus fundavit Sion,  et in ipso sperabunt pauperes populi ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַֽה־יַּעֲנֶ֖ה מַלְאֲכֵי־ג֑וֹי כִּ֤י יְהֹוָה֙ יִסַּ֣ד צִיּ֔וֹן וּבָ֥הּ יֶחֱס֖וּ עֲנִיֵּ֥י עַמּֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: What shall one then answer the messengers of the nation? That the Lord hath founded Zion, and the poor of his people shall trust in it.
